title: AI Post-Apocalyptic
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a cinematic survivor portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a cinematic post-apocalyptic survivor portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial features, expression, pose, camera angle, and main composition. Rework the setting into abandoned city ruins or a weathered wasteland, with realistic worn clothing, dust, atmospheric particles, dramatic dystopian lighting, resilient survival-adventure mood, photorealistic skin texture, and sharp movie-quality detail. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, low quality, blurry, changed identity, extra limbs, extra fingers, deformed face, bad anatomy, duplicate features, watermark, logo, text, excessive gore, blood, zombies, dismemberment, unrealistic proportions, overexposed, underexposed, noise, artifacts, cropped body, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, extra people, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, signature, interface elements
